description_long: This object is a double-panel memorial structure with a prominent Orthodox cross at its center, set on a rectangular base. The front panels are black with engraved portraits, Cyrillic inscriptions, and gold accent lines, suggesting a commemorative or funerary purpose. The panels are slightly curved and joined at the center by the cross, which is rendered in a lighter stone or concrete material. The base is broad and flat, providing stability and a platform for the upright panels. The rear of the object features a plain surface with the cross motif visible in relief. The overall construction appears solid and heavy, with smooth, polished surfaces and minimal decorative elements aside from the inscriptions and portraits.
description: A double-panel memorial with a central Orthodox cross, engraved portraits, and inscriptions on a broad stone base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the upright panels and the depth of the rectangular base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the engraved portraits, inscriptions, and the prominent Orthodox cross at the center.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the panel thickness and base depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain back of the panels and the cross motif in relief.
